questions.text: Outline any concerns regarding the impact of the Acquisition on competition.
Provide any additional information or comments that you consider relevant to the ACCC’s assessment of the Acquisition.

Provide a brief description of your business or organisation, including any commercial relationships with Rocket Software, any other Bain Capital portfolio company (or other connected entity of Rocket Software) active in the technology sector and/or the Vertica business of Open Text.
